content:
Input
* Please rewrite the final paragraph as follows, as the current wording may be unclear:

Given a string [[s]], insert a {{space}} character immediately after every [[k]] <<consecutive identical>> digits to split the repeated sequence. If [[k]] is {{0}}, output [[s]] unchanged.

Output
* Please rewrite the section as follows, as the current wording may cause confusion:

<<Line 1:>> The processed version of [[s]], where {{space}} characters may be inserted between digits.

Cases
* East test and its validator should cover the same scenario but with slightly different inputs and outputs. With this principle in mind, please review the following points when updating the cases.

* Please swap Validator 1 and Test 2.

* Validator 3: Please modify this case so that it more closely matches the scenario covered by Test 3.

* Test 5: Please modify this case so that it more closely matches the scenario covered by Validator 5.

* Long input with head=0 (Test 6): Please create a new validator of [[k]] = 0 to accompany this test.

* Long input with head=1 (Validator 6): Please create a new test of [[k]] = 1 to accompany this validator.

* Long input with head=4 (Test 8) and Long input with head=67 (Validator 8): Please update the value of [[k]] in both cases to a value between 10 and 20, as this range is not currently covered by any existing cases. Also [[k]] = 67 exceeds the upper bound (32) specified in the Constraints section.

Thanks.
